channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Chemotherapy exposure is independently associated with reduced pain severity in advanced pancreatic cancer
item.description: Chemotherapy is independently linked to lower pain severity in advanced pancreatic cancer, highlighting its role beyond tumor control.

item.title: Is AI better at recognizing faces than you are? Study examines factors that affect accuracy
item.description: Facial recognition technology is now common in security and daily use. A new study explores what influences its accuracy compared to humans.

item.title: Clean Catheterization Matches Sterile for Related UTI Risk
item.description: A clean catheterization technique is as effective as a sterile method in reducing UTI risk. Medscape Medical News

item.title: UN agency warns cost of a healthy diet has spiked 25% since 2021
item.description: The cost of a healthy diet has risen 25 percent in five years, making it unaffordable for a third of the global population, according to the UN.
